name: Playbooks
description: Standard Operating Procedures and runbooks. Each record is a repeatable procedure with trigger conditions, steps, and expected outcome. Officers can invoke a Playbook by name via semantic search.

fields.name: trigger
fields.description: When this Playbook runs — e.g. 'new founder-action issue created', 'Neon cold-start detected', 'spec reaches In Review state'

fields.name: owner_role
fields.description: Role responsible for executing (not always the same officer)

fields.name: estimated_duration
fields.description: Rough time to complete — helps Officers budget
